examples: It was the hottest July on record.
They have a siesta during the hottest part of the day.
It is one of the hottest tickets on Washington's social calendar.
Now, Pizza Hut (or Gallo, for that matter) may not make the hottest impression on a first date.
The hottest exhibit at the Los Angeles County Museum of Art (LACMA) right now is a 340-ton boulder.
